display_text: Havoc Hammer, Cost: 0: Neutral item. Instant cast ability that pulls all enemies within a 400 radius towards you, slows them by 50% for 3 seconds, and deals 175 + 150% of your Strength as magical damage. Provides no magic immunity piercing. Stats: CD: 10s, Range: 400, Slow: 50%, Duration: 3s, Damage: 175 + 1.5x STR.
